title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 446.240 - Duty of register of lands, evidence
text:
446.240.  Duty of register of lands, evidence. — The register of lands shall procure suitable books and record therein all letters and instructions received from the land department at Washington concerning lands granted to this state, and shall also record in such books all lists of lands certified by the commissioner of such land office, under the provisions of the act recited in section 446.230, as belonging to the state; and copies of such record, certified by the register of lands, shall be prima facie evidence of the facts therein stated.
(RSMo 1939 § 1848) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1684; 1919 § 5371; 1909 § 6316 
Copies of patents evidence, when, 59.390 
Patents to be evidence of title, 241.120
